message:
fix(codegen): Fix body_0 label scoping in loop emission

- Move body_0 label opening BEFORE condition code emission in both
  emitNativeLoop and emitNativeLoopBlock to prevent body_0 from being
  nested inside if-blocks created by header's if_false8 instructions

- Add dummy break emission (if (false) break :body_N;) in all early
  return paths when body label was created but not used

- Change dummy break condition from (!body_label_used && !block_terminated)
  to just (!body_label_used) to always emit when label is unused

This fixes 17+ "unused block label" and "label not found" errors when
building the TSC benchmark with 607 frozen function shards.
